sources.name: ONS
sources.dataset: Child Mortality in England and Wales

metadata.methodology: Infant mortality rate is deaths under 1 year per 1,000 live births, registered deaths in England and Wales (ONS). Stillbirth figures from ONS, covering babies born at 24+ weeks who showed no signs of life. International comparison from OECD Health Statistics. Deprivation breakdown from ONS using Index of Multiple Deprivation quintiles linked to mother's lower super output area.
knownIssues: International comparisons are affected by differences in birth registration practices — some countries have higher thresholds for registering live births
Deprivation quintile data uses mother's area of residence, not individual socioeconomic status
COVID-19 may have affected 2020-21 data through reduced antenatal contact and changed care pathways
